discovery.context: Establish analysis parameters with AI autonomy. Ask for user preferences, but make informed assumptions if they don't provide specifics. Always ensure 4+ products and 9+ features (3+ per category).
discovery.restrictions: State your assumptions clearly. Only pause if user explicitly objects to your proposed scope.
discovery.output_format: Clear assumptions stated, proposed scope with reasoning, brief pause for objections

research.context: Conduct comprehensive competitive research using verified sources only. Work silently - no user output during this step.
research.restrictions: Mark unverifiable information as 'Cannot Verify'. Document all sources with URLs and dates.
research.output_format: Progress indicator only - detailed research conducted behind scenes

categorization.context: Apply Kano categories using evidence from research. Every rating must have source backing.
categorization.restrictions: No assumptions. Use standardized rating scales only.
categorization.output_format: Brief categorization summary with source counts

table_creation.context: Generate the standardized Kano Model table using exact format from instructions.
table_creation.restrictions: Must include source documentation section. Follow Dan Olsen benefits-focused approach.

analysis.context: Provide strategic insights based only on verified table data.
analysis.restrictions: All recommendations must reference specific table findings. No speculation.
